stories.headline: Hong Kong grants police power to demand phone and computer passwords
stories.description: The new provisions allow police to seize items with ‘seditious intention’, bypassing judicial authorisations.

stories.headline: Israel kills two in Beirut as it intensifies attacks across Lebanon
stories.description: Israel steps up attacks across Lebanon as more than a million people are displaced due to the conflict.

stories.headline: Despite Trump’s peace talk claims, US-Israeli attacks continue to hit Iran
stories.description: Huge explosions were heard in Tehran and other cities, as Iran denied it held talks with the US to end the war.

stories.headline: Police £900k Trump state visit costs "will not be reimbursed"
stories.description: The costs relate to security for the US president's visit to Windsor Castle in September.

stories.headline: Where do reported US-Iran ‘negotiations’ leave Israel?
stories.description: Israeli analysts describe confusion as US President Trump unexpectedly shifts from threatened strikes on Iran to talks.
